name: O-13 detector reports clean and exits zero when no deprecated tokens are referenced in the scanned paths
command: mkdir -p src && printf 'import { signal } from "./tokens";\nexport const Button = () => signal.success;\n' > src/Button.tsx && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/design-token-freshness.sh" --registry "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/design-tokens/registry.yaml" --paths src 2>err.txt && grep -q 'clean' err.txt && echo clean 1>&2
